training.title: Looking to build some strong forearms. Can I accomplish it all with a judo belt and weights or would you recommend one of those wrist extensions machines I see everywhere. Looking to build muscle and strength. Currently just doing heavy farmer carriers ordered a Bruce Lee machine as well.
training.summary: if I have a judo belt can I use that to train my forearms and then rest my forearms on the bench while doing the movements? submitted by /u/Mindless_Cod_3097 [link] [comments]

youtube_media.title: BREAKING PR'S WITH LARS RØRBAKKEN | MONSTER FACTORY
youtube_media.summary:
We're back in the Monster Factory for PR day, Monster Michael Todd is aiming for new personal records and @LarsRor  is getting his starting weights to add these armwrestling specific lifts into his training. Watch as we engage in various strength training exercises and intense arm wrestling preparations. This session is all about pushing limits and improving our table strength. Get ready for some serious armwrestling training action! or..... maybe it's all ego? 
Join this channel to get access to perks:https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCarJKBV9GEpXRHrw4bEEhHA/join
👕https://www.ninelineapparel.com/discount/MONSTER20 for a discount. Support the company that gives back to those who give all.
